entity.summary: Core ecosystem automated-market-maker decentralized exchange represented by a V2-style liquidity and swap deployment with subgraph-tracked volume, trading fees, protocol revenue, and liquidity-provider revenue.
entity.notes: A maintained DEX adapter preserves Glyph Exchange on Core and queries the CoreDAO-hosted Glyph subgraph for total volume and fee accounting. A stable first-party interface and independently verified recent user activity were not recovered during this pass, so HEI uses limited rather than active or dead status and leaves URL fields unset.

evidence.title: Glyph Exchange Core DEX adapter
evidence.notes: Current adapter identifies Glyph Exchange on Core, queries a CoreDAO-hosted Glyph subgraph, records a 2024-03-19 activity start, and calculates swap volume, user fees, protocol revenue, and liquidity-provider revenue.

evidence.title: Glyph V2 DEX discovery entry
evidence.notes: Current DEX registry preserves Glyph V2 as a Core ecosystem decentralized exchange. Limited status reflects the absence of a recovered first-party interface and independently verified recent usage rather than a claimed shutdown.
